---
title: "About me"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/ek-ku
    - text: "{{< iconify fa6-brands bluesky >}}"
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/evelinekiki.bsky.social
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/ekkuijjer
    - text: "{{< iconify academicons academia-square >}}"
      href: https://soton.academia.edu/EvelineKikiKuijjer
      
---
I’m Kiki Kuijjer, 

I help people and organisations connect audiences with research, collections, and cultural heritage through digital tools and communication.

I work in Digital Scholarship at the University of Southampton, focusing on 2D digitisation and helping people connect with library collections. I also manage digital engagement for the Ocean Decade Heritage Network, an NGO aiming to improve the integration of ocean heritage in the UN Ocean Decade.

As a freelancer, I offer consultancy, social media support, website management, and science communication services.

On my blog, I write about digital tools, research communication, and the intersections between culture, science, and the sea.
